error_signature: JSON parameter needs to be valid JSON
title: Invalid JSON in HTTP Request node
symptom: When sending a POST request via the HTTP Request node, n8n returns 'JSON parameter needs to be valid JSON'. The JSON formatting appears correct in the UI but fails during execution.
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node or context
root_cause: The error arises when the JSON structure is improperly formatted, often due to incorrect escaping of quotes or syntax errors in the JSON string. This prevents n8n from recognizing the input as valid JSON.
fix_steps: Review the JSON structure for proper syntax
Ensure all quotes are correctly escaped
Test the JSON in a validator tool
Update the HTTP Request node with the corrected JSON
agent_instruction: Correct the JSON formatting in the HTTP Request node and test again.
